name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme (PMSS)
eligibility: Wards and widows of Ex/Serving Defence personnel, Para Military Forces
benefits: Rs. 3000/month for boys, Rs. 3600/month for girls

name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships (CSSS)
eligibility: Students belonging to families with income less than Rs. 8 lakh per annum, passed 12th with 80+ percentile

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMSS)
eligibility: Students from economically weaker sections studying in government schools

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC
benefits: Full tuition fees and maintenance allowance

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
eligibility: Top 1% of Class 12 students pursuing natural and basic sciences

name: Pragati Scholarship for Girls
eligibility: Girl students admitted to AICTE approved colleges

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
eligibility: Students from North Eastern Region pursuing higher studies
